title: McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Highlights of the August 4 EIFEL Rules and Canada's Pillar 2 Proposals - Toronto
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: Highlights of the August 4 EIFEL Rules and Canada's Pillar 2 Proposals - Toronto
Join us for an interactive discussion about the important features of the latest draft of the EIFEL rules and Canada’s proposed legislation to implement Pillar 2.
We will highlight the changes to the EIFEL rules contained in the August 4 proposals as compared to previous drafts and will discuss some of the anticipated challenges and opportunities for taxpayers. On Pillar 2, we will provide a brief overview of Canada’s version of the rules, our predictions regarding the issues that may arise, and will discuss some planning opportunities as well as potential pitfalls and uncertainties.
- Raj Juneja , Partner and Co-Head of the National Tax Group, Toronto
- Brett Anderson , Partner and Co-Head of the National Tax Group, Calgary
- Kim Brown , Partner and Lead of the Tax Group, Vancouver
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program is eligible for up to 1.5 Substantive Hours under the Law Society of Ontario’s mandatory CPD Regime.
This seminar may be eligible for Ontario CPA credits. More information can be found here: https://www.cpaontario.ca/members/regulations-guidance/continuing-professional-development
Note: This will take place in our Toronto office and will be given in English only. A lunch to suit most dietary concerns will be served.
11:30 a.m. Registration & lunch 12:00 p.m. Session starts 1:30 p.m. Session ends
